name: hyperliquid_trade_signal
description: Returns a directional trade view for a single Hyperliquid perp. Output covers bias (LONG/SHORT/MIXED), suggested entry zone, stop-loss, take-profit targets, nearby liquidation clusters, and a short AI-written reasoning section grounded in local tracker data.

symbol.description: Trading symbol (e.g., BTC, ETH, SOL, DOGE)

value.description: Full trade setup with direction, levels, and reasoning

sla.refundPolicy: Full refund if setup not delivered within 90 seconds
